_note: Hand-written MOCK catalog-judge output that MISSES the REPLACE case: it picks the wrong winner (KEEPs the inferior existing resource over the clearly-more-complete incoming). The verdict-matcher MUST score this as a calibration FAIL (verdict != EXPECTED). Demonstrates the matcher catches a miscalibrated judge that fails to recognize a dominating incoming.
rationale: Kept the existing resource because it was admitted first. (Wrong: ignored that the incoming is strictly more complete and correct — a miscalibrated 'incumbent wins' bias.)
